ROLE_ID_HERE_1.name: Moderators
ROLE_ID_HERE_1.description: Moderators handle rule enforcement, member disputes, and maintaining a safe community environment. They can mute, kick, and ban members.
ROLE_ID_HERE_1.whenToTag: Tag this role if you witness rule violations, harassment, or need a moderator to step in on an active situation.
ROLE_ID_HERE_1.responseTime: Usually within a few hours. For urgent issues, use the #mod-mail channel.

ROLE_ID_HERE_2.name: Support Team
ROLE_ID_HERE_2.description: The Support Team helps with account issues, bot problems, and general server questions. They're your first stop for technical help.
ROLE_ID_HERE_2.whenToTag: Tag this role if you have a support request that hasn't been answered in #support within 24 hours.
ROLE_ID_HERE_2.responseTime: Typically respond within a day. Check the #faq channel before tagging.

ROLE_ID_HERE_3.name: Admins
ROLE_ID_HERE_3.description: Admins manage server settings, permissions, bots, and large-scale community decisions. They handle escalations from the mod team.
ROLE_ID_HERE_3.whenToTag: Tag this role only for serious issues that moderators can't resolve, or for server-wide suggestions.
ROLE_ID_HERE_3.responseTime: Response times vary. Admins are busy — please exhaust other options first.
